acquisition method: the Orbitrap Fusion Lumos was operated in a data-dependent acquisition mode.
cleavage agent: Proteins were trypsin digested at 37°C for 16 h
collision energy: which were fragmented by 37.5% higher-energy collisional dissociation.
fragmentation method: which were fragmented by 37.5% higher-energy collisional dissociation.
instrument: acquired on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermo Fisher Scientific, San Jose, CA)
labeling: the SF was evaluated by proteomic analysis.
